_comment: envctl PROJECT settings layer (additive to the user-global source-of-truth at envctl/home/.claude/settings.json). Adds the hf-checkpoint continuity hook so envctl sessions auto-checkpoint .handoff after each task (Stop) and before compaction (PreCompact). DORMANT until the kernel's `hf checkpoint --auto` verb lands (Epic A TASK-0001/0002) — the script no-ops + never blocks until then. Ledger-resident: writes only the fleet ledger at $META_ROOT/.handoff/ledger.db (ADR-0004).
